CONCEPTUAL_DANCER.name: Conceptual Dancer
CONCEPTUAL_DANCER.description: The 'Artiste'. Focuses on contemporary movement and storytelling rather than just sharp choreography.

FORCED_TO_PARTICIPATE.name: Forced to Participate
FORCED_TO_PARTICIPATE.description: The reluctant star. They have the talent, but they’d rather be anywhere else. A classic 'cool/detached' edit.

HIPPIE.name: Hippie
HIPPIE.description: The 'Peace and Love' member. Prefers acoustic sessions and meditation to the high-pressure industry grind.

INTERNATIONAL.name: International
INTERNATIONAL.description: The stranger in a strange land. They bring global flair but struggle with the local culture/language barriers.

LATIN_LOVER.name: Latin Lover
LATIN_LOVER.description: The group's designated romantic. Known for heavy winking, smooth vocals, and high-intensity charm.

LEGACY.name: Legacy
LEGACY.description: The 'Prince' of the industry. The son of a famous singer or executive; everything to lose if they fail.

MODEL.name: Model
MODEL.description: The visual ace. They walk the stage like a runway. Often criticized for being 'just a face'.

NERDY.name: Nerdy
NERDY.description: The model student. High technical knowledge, low social grace. The 'Brain' of the team.

OPENLY_GAY.name: Openly Gay
OPENLY_GAY.description: The trailblazer. Authentic and unapologetic, carrying both intense fan support and public scrutiny.

SECRETLY_GAY.name: Secretly Gay
SECRETLY_GAY.description: The tragic romantic. Masking their true self for the 'idol' image, leading to high internal stress and deep emotive performances.

SEXIST.name: Sexist
SEXIST.description: The toxic contestant. Outdated views and abrasive attitude toward female staff. The season's true villain.

STONER.name: Stoner
STONER.description: The 'baked' boy. Too relaxed for the pressure, often confused by the schedules, but very chill.

UNDERDOG.name: Underdog
UNDERDOG.description: The Zero-to-Hero story. No formal training, but a heart of gold and a 'never say die' attitude.

UNPREDICTABLE_MESS.name: Unpredictable Mess
UNPREDICTABLE_MESS.description: Total chaos. You don't know if they'll hit the high note or fall off the stage. TV gold, but a nightmare for the group.

VERY_TALL.name: Very Tall
VERY_TALL.description: The 'Tower'. Their height is their primary identity. Often clumsy in dance but impossible to miss on stage.

THE_TRIPLE_THREAT.name: The Triple Threat
THE_TRIPLE_THREAT.description: The perfect trainee. Can sing, dance, and act flawlessly. The one everyone is afraid to compete against.

THE_YOUTUBE_SENSATION.name: The YouTube Sensation
THE_YOUTUBE_SENSATION.description: Famous before the show started. They have millions of views but zero formal training.

THE_GOSPEL_SINGER.name: The Gospel Singer
THE_GOSPEL_SINGER.description: Raised in the church choir. Incredible vocal range and a strong moral compass that often clashes with the industry.

THE_REFORMED_BAD_BOY.name: The Reformed Bad Boy
THE_REFORMED_BAD_BOY.description: Has a 'troubled' past and is using this show as his one last shot at redemption.

THE_JADED_PROFESSIONAL.name: The Jaded Professional
THE_JADED_PROFESSIONAL.description: Was a backup dancer for years. He knows how the sausage is made and doesn't buy into the magic anymore.

THE_SMALL_TOWN_HERO.name: The Small Town Hero
THE_SMALL_TOWN_HERO.description: Left his farm or factory job to fly to the big city. The whole town is counting on him.

THE_THEATER_KID.name: The Theater Kid
THE_THEATER_KID.description: Everything is a performance. He over-emotes, projects his voice, and is constantly 'on'.

THE_BLUE_COLLAR_MARTYR.name: The Blue Collar Martyr
THE_BLUE_COLLAR_MARTYR.description: He has a young child and a wife at home. This isn't a dream for him; it's a financial necessity.

THE_SOCIAL_STRATEGIST.name: The Social Strategist
THE_SOCIAL_STRATEGIST.description: He’s watched every season of every survival show. He knows how to manipulate the edit.

THE_PURE_HEART.name: The Pure Heart
THE_PURE_HEART.description: Genuinely doesn't realize he's in a competition. He just wants to make friends and sing.

THE_FAILED_CHILD_STAR.name: The Failed Child Star
THE_FAILED_CHILD_STAR.description: Was in a hit TV show or commercial at age 10. Trying to prove he's more than just a 'former kid'.

THE_TECH_WIZARD.name: The Tech Wizard
THE_TECH_WIZARD.description: More comfortable with an iPad than a microphone. He's the one fixing everyone's tech in the dorm.

THE_COMIC_RELIEF.name: The Comic Relief
THE_COMIC_RELIEF.description: He might not be the best singer, but the show is boring without him. The designated 'funny guy'.

THE_ALPHA_LEADER.name: The Alpha Leader
THE_ALPHA_LEADER.description: Natural born commander. He organizes rehearsals and gives the speeches, but can be overbearing.

THE_DARK_HORSE.name: The Dark Horse
THE_DARK_HORSE.description: Invisible for the first few weeks, then suddenly delivers a performance that shocks everyone.

THE_ADRENALINE_JUNKIE.name: The Adrenaline Junkie
THE_ADRENALINE_JUNKIE.description: Loves the stunts. He’s the one doing backflips off the stage and scaring the producers.

THE_SNOB.name: The Snob
THE_SNOB.description: Believes 'Pop' is beneath him. He was trained in jazz or opera and constantly critiques the music.

THE_CHARISMATIC_STUMBLER.name: The Charismatic Stumbler
THE_CHARISMATIC_STUMBLER.description: Terrible dancer, mediocre singer, but the camera loves him. He survives on charm alone.

THE_LOYAL_SIDEKICK.name: The Loyal Sidekick
THE_LOYAL_SIDEKICK.description: He's happy to be in the background as long as his best friend succeeds. The ultimate group synergy booster.

THE_GLAMOUR_PUSS.name: The Glamour Puss
THE_GLAMOUR_PUSS.description: Spends more time in the makeup chair than the practice room. He won't sweat because it ruins his look.

THE_WOLFPACK_LEADER.name: The Wolfpack Leader
THE_WOLFPACK_LEADER.description: The center of the 'cool' group in the dorms. If you're not with him, you're against him.

THE_SENSITIVE_POET.name: The Sensitive Poet
THE_SENSITIVE_POET.description: Writes lyrics in a notebook and cries during emotional songs. The 'soft' member fans want to protect.

THE_WORK_HARD_PLAY_HARD.name: The Party Animal
THE_WORK_HARD_PLAY_HARD.description: Practices for 10 hours then sneaks out to a club. High energy, low sleep, constant trouble.

THE_MANTRA_MASTER.name: The Mantra Master
THE_MANTRA_MASTER.description: Into new-age spirituality. He’s always trying to get the other guys to meditate or align their chakras.

THE_VETERAN_SKEPTIC.name: The Veteran Skeptic
THE_VETERAN_SKEPTIC.description: He's been on three different reality shows. He's bored by the twists and expects the worst from the staff.

THE_HEART_ON_SLEEVE.name: The Heart on Sleeve
THE_HEART_ON_SLEEVE.description: You know exactly what he's thinking because his face can't hide it. Producers use his reactions as B-roll constantly.

THE_METHOD_PERFORMER.name: The Method Performer
THE_METHOD_PERFORMER.description: He doesn't just sing a song; he lives it. If the song is sad, he won't speak to anyone for the whole day.

THE_DORM_DAD.name: The Dorm Dad
THE_DORM_DAD.description: He's 23 and feels like he's 50. He cleans the dishes and makes sure everyone has their alarm set.

THE_INSTIGATOR.name: The Instigator
THE_INSTIGATOR.description: He doesn't start the fights, he just 'asks questions' that lead to them. The ultimate pot-stirrer.

THE_OVER_PREPARED.name: The Over-Prepared
THE_OVER_PREPARED.description: He has a spreadsheet for his vocal warmups and three different pairs of shoes for every floor type.

THE_RECKLESS_TALENT.name: The Reckless Talent
THE_RECKLESS_TALENT.description: Could be the winner if he could just show up on time. High skill, zero discipline.

THE_MYSTERIOUS_LONER.name: The Mysterious Loner
THE_MYSTERIOUS_LONER.description: He doesn't share anything about his life. He eats alone and practices alone. The fans are obsessed with his 'secret'.

THE_EX_ATHLETE.name: The Ex-Athlete
THE_EX_ATHLETE.description: Was headed for the Olympics or the pros before an injury. He treats the stage like a sports field.

THE_UNAPOLOGETIC_FLIRT.name: The Unapologetic Flirt
THE_UNAPOLOGETIC_FLIRT.description: He flirts with the judges, the staff, and the fans in the front row. He knows he's hot.

THE_TRAGIC_BACKSTORY.name: The Sob Story
THE_TRAGIC_BACKSTORY.description: Every interview package mentions his hardships. The show uses him to pull at the heartstrings.

THE_REBEL_WITHOUT_CAUSE.name: The Rebel
THE_REBEL_WITHOUT_CAUSE.description: He hates the 'uniforms', hates the 'choreography', and thinks the judges are 'suits'. Very popular with teenage girls.

THE_PERFECTIONIST_CRUMBLE.name: The Perfectionist
THE_PERFECTIONIST_CRUMBLE.description: If he makes one tiny mistake, he has a full-blown meltdown. He’s his own worst enemy.

THE_NATURE_BOY.name: The Nature Boy
THE_NATURE_BOY.description: Always seen walking barefoot or talking about the moon. He brings plants into the dorm.

THE_OLD_SOUL.name: The Old Soul
THE_OLD_SOUL.description: A 19-year-old who listens exclusively to 1950s swing and wears cardigans. He’s completely out of place and fans love it.

THE_DORM_CHEF.name: The Dorm Chef
THE_DORM_CHEF.description: He is the only reason the group hasn't starved. Every dorm segment features him cooking.

THE_REBORN_ARTIST.name: The Reborn Artist
THE_REBORN_ARTIST.description: He was a classical violinist or painter who decided to pivot to pop at the last minute.

THE_STREET_DANCER_UNDERDOG.name: The Street Dancer
THE_STREET_DANCER_UNDERDOG.description: Learned to dance in the subway or at the park. He doesn't know 'counts', he just knows 'feeling'.

THE_MODERN_SKEPTIC.name: The Modern Skeptic
THE_MODERN_SKEPTIC.description: He thinks everything in the industry is fake. He is constantly making snarky comments about the 'manufactured' process.

THE_INSECURE_GENIUS.name: The Insecure Genius
THE_INSECURE_GENIUS.description: The best singer in the room, but he genuinely believes he's terrible. Needs constant validation.

THE_FASHION_VICTIM.name: The Trendsetter
THE_FASHION_VICTIM.description: His outfits are 6 months ahead of the curve. People mock him at first, then they copy him.

THE_SILENT_STORM.name: The Silent Storm
THE_SILENT_STORM.description: Doesn't say a word in the dorms or interviews. On stage, he becomes a completely different, explosive person.

THE_OVER_FAMILIAL.name: The Brother
THE_OVER_FAMILIAL.description: Calls everyone his 'brother' on day one. A bit clingy, but fiercely loyal.

THE_INDUSTRY_PLANT.name: The Industry Plant
THE_INDUSTRY_PLANT.description: Clearly favored by the higher-ups. He gets the best lines and the center spot, causing major internal jealousy.

THE_LATE_BLOOMER.name: The Late Bloomer
THE_LATE_BLOOMER.description: He’s a bit older than the others. He decided to follow his dream at 24 and feels the clock ticking.

THE_WALLPAPER.name: The Wallpaper
THE_WALLPAPER.description: He is technically there, but you forget his name the moment he leaves the screen. He never causes trouble and never stands out.

THE_CORPORATE_TRAINEE.name: The Corporate Trainee
THE_CORPORATE_TRAINEE.description: He follows the label's handbook to the letter. He gives rehearsed, safe answers and has zero personal flair.

THE_GENERIC_CUTIE.name: The Generic Cutie
THE_GENERIC_CUTIE.description: He has a nice face and a nice smile, but that is the beginning and end of his personality.

THE_PERPETUAL_NEUTRAL.name: The Perpetual Neutral
THE_PERPETUAL_NEUTRAL.description: When a fight breaks out, he leaves the room to go practice. He refuses to take a side or show any emotion.

THE_LITERAL_GUY.name: The Literal Guy
THE_LITERAL_GUY.description: He has zero sense of humor or sarcasm. He takes every instruction literally and kills the vibe of every joke.

THE_STEADY_MIDDLE.name: The Steady Middle
THE_STEADY_MIDDLE.description: He is the 15th best at everything. He will never be in the bottom, and he will never be in the top.

THE_POLITE_GHOST.name: The Polite Ghost
THE_POLITE_GHOST.description: He is so polite and quiet that the mentors often forget he is in the room. He apologizes for existing.

THE_ONE_NOTE.name: The One Note
THE_ONE_NOTE.description: He has one facial expression for every song. Whether it's a ballad or a dance track, he looks exactly the same.

THE_BACKGROUND_STUDENT.name: The Background Student
THE_BACKGROUND_STUDENT.description: He treats the competition like a summer school class. He takes notes, sits in the back, and avoids the spotlight.

THE_BYSTANDER.name: The Bystander
THE_BYSTANDER.description: He is only ever seen in the background of other people's drama, looking mildly confused. He has no arc of his own.

THE_SABOTEUR.name: The Saboteur
THE_SABOTEUR.description: He isn't just here to win; he's here to make sure everyone else loses. He hides shoes, 'accidentally' spills water on electronics, and feeds people wrong information about rehearsal times.

THE_INDUSTRY_SACRIFICE.name: The Industry Sacrifice
THE_INDUSTRY_SACRIFICE.description: He has been in the system too long and it has broken him. He is a shell of a person who follows orders perfectly but has a hollow look in his eyes. A walking burnout.

THE_PATHOLOGICAL_LIAR.name: The Pathological Liar
THE_PATHOLOGICAL_LIAR.description: He invents a new tragedy every week to get more screen time. From fake injuries to imaginary family drama, he treats his life like a script.

THE_NARCISSISTIC_SOCIOPATH.name: The Narcissist
THE_NARCISSISTIC_SOCIOPATH.description: He genuinely believes he is the only person who matters. He views other contestants as props for his solo stage and mentors as obstacles to his glory.

THE_SPIRALING_ADDICT.name: The Spiraling Addict
THE_SPIRALING_ADDICT.description: Using substances to cope with the 20-hour work days. He’s brilliant when he’s 'on', but he’s visibly sweating and shaking during the morning evaluations.

THE_PREDATORY_CHARMER.name: The Predatory Charmer
THE_PREDATORY_CHARMER.description: He uses sexual tension and grooming tactics to control younger or more insecure contestants, creating a cult-like circle of followers within the dorm.

THE_MACHIAVELLIAN_HEIR.name: The Machiavellian
THE_MACHIAVELLIAN_HEIR.description: He knows every producer's secret. He uses blackmail and quiet threats to ensure he gets the center spot and that his rivals are edited out of the show.

THE_BULLY_ARCHITECT.name: The Bully
THE_BULLY_ARCHITECT.description: He doesn't just tease; he systematically destroys the confidence of anyone he perceives as a threat. He targets people's deepest insecurities until they quit.

THE_PARANOID_STALKER.name: The Paranoid Stalker
THE_PARANOID_STALKER.description: He is obsessed with a rival. He goes through their trash, reads their private journals, and becomes dangerously fixated on 'surpassing' them.

THE_VENOMOUS_MARTYR.name: The Venomous Martyr
THE_VENOMOUS_MARTYR.description: He works harder than anyone just so he can use it as a weapon to make others feel guilty. He wants everyone to know he is suffering for the group, and he resents them for it.

THE_SMOLDERING_LEAD.name: The Smoldering Lead
THE_SMOLDERING_LEAD.description: He doesn't need to say anything; he just looks into the lens and the room melts. He is the undisputed 'Face' of the group.

THE_PLAYFUL_TEASE.name: The Playful Tease
THE_PLAYFUL_TEASE.description: A master of the wink and the lip-bite. He knows exactly how to work a crowd and plays the 'lover' role to perfection.

THE_RIPPED_JOCK.name: The Ripped Jock
THE_RIPPED_JOCK.description: He is the one 'accidentally' ripping his shirt open during the bridge. He sells a rugged, hyper-masculine sexuality.

THE_SOPHISTICATED_SUIT.name: The Sophisticated Gent
THE_SOPHISTICATED_SUIT.description: He exudes expensive, mature energy. He’s the one in the tailored suit who looks like he just stepped off a yacht.

THE_BOY_NEXT_DOOR_CRUSH.name: The Boy Next Door
THE_BOY_NEXT_DOOR_CRUSH.description: Cute, approachable, and sweet—but with a hidden, charming edge that comes out on stage.

THE_DANGEROUS_BAD_BOY.name: The Dangerous Bad Boy
THE_DANGEROUS_BAD_BOY.description: Leather jackets, tattoos, and a 'don't touch me' vibe. He is the personification of 'I can fix him' energy.

THE_POETIC_SOUL.name: The Poetic Soul
THE_POETIC_SOUL.description: He sings with his eyes closed and looks like he’s in constant, beautiful pain. Deeply emotional and magnetic.

THE_CHARISMATIC_DANCER.name: The Fluid Performer
THE_CHARISMATIC_DANCER.description: He moves with a grace that borders on hypnotic. Every body roll and finger-snap is designed to captivate.

THE_REFINED_EXOTIC.name: The Exotic Edge
THE_REFINED_EXOTIC.description: He has a look that people can't quite place, giving him a unique, 'international' appeal that feels exclusive and high-end.

THE_SILENT_HEARTTHROB.name: The Silent Heartthrob
THE_SILENT_HEARTTHROB.description: The 'man of few words'. When he finally speaks or smiles, it’s a national event. Pure, concentrated intensity.

THE_ONE_HIT_MEME.name: The One-Hit Meme
THE_ONE_HIT_MEME.description: Viral for one funny audition moment or a specific catchphrase. The show keeps him around for the ratings, but everyone knows he can't actually perform.

THE_ENTITLED_HEIR.name: The Entitled Heir
THE_ENTITLED_HEIR.description: Wealthy and well-connected. He treats the staff like servants and expects to win because of his status. Fans find him insufferable.

THE_RELUCTANT_DANCER.name: The Reluctant Dancer
THE_RELUCTANT_DANCER.description: A great singer who considers dancing 'beneath' a real artist. He complains during every choreography session and ruins the group formation.

THE_CHRONIC_QUITTER.name: The Chronic Quitter
THE_CHRONIC_QUITTER.description: High talent, zero stamina. He packs his bags and threatens to leave every time he gets a bad critique. Eventually, the producers let him.

THE_STAGE_PARENT_PROJECT.name: The Stage Mom's Project
THE_STAGE_PARENT_PROJECT.description: He’s only here because his parents forced him. He has no passion, no personal style, and looks miserable in every shot.

THE_CRINGE_TRY_HARD.name: The Cringe Try-Hard
THE_CRINGE_TRY_HARD.description: Over-performs everything. His facial expressions are too big, his jokes are dated, and he tries so hard to be 'cool' that it becomes painful to watch.

THE_ONE_TRICK_PONY.name: The One-Trick Pony
THE_ONE_TRICK_PONY.description: He can do exactly one thing—like a high-note or a specific b-boy move. Once the audience has seen it twice, they lose interest.

THE_GOSSIP_MONGER.name: The Gossip Monger
THE_GOSSIP_MONGER.description: Focused 100% on what others are doing. He spends more time talking to the cameras about his rivals than he does practicing.

THE_OUTDATED_PRO.name: The Outdated Pro
THE_OUTDATED_PRO.description: He was in a local boyband 10 years ago. His style, hair, and dancing are stuck in the late 90s, and he refuses to update his 'look'.

THE_ANXIOUS_WRECK.name: The Anxious Wreck
THE_ANXIOUS_WRECK.description: He has the skill, but he shakes so hard during live performances that he drops the mic or forgets the lyrics. It's too painful for fans to watch.

THE_FACTORY_STANDARD.name: The Factory Standard
THE_FACTORY_STANDARD.description: He is exactly what a trainee is 'supposed' to be. He does exactly as he is told, never misses a beat, but has absolutely no personal identity.

THE_PRACTICAL_PARTICIPANT.name: The Practical Participant
THE_PRACTICAL_PARTICIPANT.description: He views the competition as a temporary job or a summer camp experience. He's polite, works hard, but has zero emotional stake in winning.

THE_SHADOW_MEMBER.name: The Shadow
THE_SHADOW_MEMBER.description: He is only seen standing behind the leader or the center. He is the personification of 'supporting cast'—useful for the formation, but invisible to the eye.

THE_STUDIO_RAT.name: The Studio Rat
THE_STUDIO_RAT.description: He is incredible in the practice room but disappears on stage. He loves the technical process but has zero stage presence or aura.

THE_NICE_GUY_NEXT_DOOR.name: The Nice Guy
THE_NICE_GUY_NEXT_DOOR.description: He’s friendly, he’s helpful, and he’s completely unmemorable. He’s the person everyone says 'is a great guy' right before they vote to eliminate him.

THE_SAFETY_PLAYER.name: The Safety Player
THE_SAFETY_PLAYER.description: He never takes risks. He picks the easiest lines, the simplest dance moves, and the safest clothes. He stays in the competition by simply being 'not bad enough to cut'.

THE_LITERAL_LISTENER.name: The Literal Listener
THE_LITERAL_LISTENER.description: He does exactly what the mentors say—literally. If they tell him to smile, he smiles at the exact same second every time. No soul, just execution.

THE_BACKUP_CHOICE.name: The Backup Choice
THE_BACKUP_CHOICE.description: The person who is only in the group because someone else quit or got injured. He knows he’s a placeholder and he acts like one.

THE_STEADY_STUDENT.name: The Steady Student
THE_STEADY_STUDENT.description: He treats the competition like a high school math class. He’s there to learn the 'formula' of being a star, but he has no natural talent for it.

THE_DORM_WALLFLOWER.name: The Wallflower
THE_DORM_WALLFLOWER.description: In the dorm segments, he is only ever seen in the background of other people's shots, usually eating or cleaning. He never speaks to the camera.

THE_EFFORTLESS_ACE.name: The Effortless Ace
THE_EFFORTLESS_ACE.description: He shows up to rehearsal in a hoodie, barely breaks a sweat, and executes the choreo perfectly. He makes greatness look easy and a little bit boring.

THE_URBAN_MAVERICK.name: The Urban Maverick
THE_URBAN_MAVERICK.description: The street-style king. He brings a raw, hip-hop edge to the group. He’s the one who gets away with wearing sunglasses indoors.

THE_ENIGMATIC_ICE_PRINCE.name: The Ice Prince
THE_ENIGMATIC_ICE_PRINCE.description: Cold, distant, and incredibly handsome. He rarely speaks, and when he does, it's short and sharp. Fans spend all their time trying to make him crack a smile.

THE_CROWD_COMMANDER.name: The Crowd Commander
THE_CROWD_COMMANDER.description: He owns every inch of the stage. He doesn't just perform; he leads the audience. A natural born star with massive energy.

THE_CHILL_PRODIGY.name: The Chill Prodigy
THE_CHILL_PRODIGY.description: The youngest-looking one who is somehow the most skilled. He’s incredibly relaxed under pressure and seems to treat the competition like a game.

THE_NEO_SOUL_CROONER.name: The Neo-Soul Crooner
THE_NEO_SOUL_CROONER.description: Brings a smooth, R&B sensibility to everything. He has an 'adult' coolness that sets him apart from the pop-focused trainees.

THE_SWAG_MACHINE.name: The Swag Machine
THE_SWAG_MACHINE.description: His dance style is all about 'feel' and 'pocket'. He’s the one everyone goes to when they want to learn how to make a move look cool.

THE_UNDERSTATED_ARCHITECT.name: The Architect
THE_UNDERSTATED_ARCHITECT.description: A quiet genius. He’s the one reworking the group's harmonies or choreo in the middle of the night. Coolly competent and humble.

THE_HIGH_FASHION_ICON.name: The Fashion Icon
THE_HIGH_FASHION_ICON.description: He looks like he stepped off a high-end editorial shoot. He treats the hallways like a runway and has a terrifyingly cool aura.

THE_MODERN_ROCKER.name: The Modern Rocker
THE_MODERN_ROCKER.description: Brings a gritty, indie-rock vibe to a pop show. He’s the one with the slightly messy hair and the effortless 'cool guy' smirk.

THE_SCOLIOSIS_STRIVER.name: The Scoliosis Striver
THE_SCOLIOSIS_STRIVER.description: A curved spine makes every dance move twice as painful. He wears a brace off-camera and overcompensates with rigid discipline to keep his lines straight.

THE_CHRONIC_INSOMNIAC.name: The Chronic Insomniac
THE_CHRONIC_INSOMNIAC.description: He hasn't slept more than 3 hours a night since the show started. He's hyper-focused during late-night practices but is a ghost during the day.

THE_HIDDEN_ASTHMATIC.name: The Hidden Asthmatic
THE_HIDDEN_ASTHMATIC.description: He hides his inhaler in his gym bag. Intense cardio choreo is a life-or-death struggle, leading to frequent 'breaks' that mentors mistake for laziness.

THE_TINNITUS_SUFFERER.name: The Tinnitus Sufferer
THE_TINNITUS_SUFFERER.description: A constant ringing in his ears makes it hard to hear the backing track. He struggles with pitch and rhythm but is too proud to explain why.

THE_ANEMIC_FADEOUT.name: The Anemic Fadeout
THE_ANEMIC_FADEOUT.description: Low iron levels mean he's constantly on the verge of fainting. He looks pale and 'delicate', which fans find visual, but his energy levels are bottom-tier.

THE_COLOR_BLIND_DESIGNER.name: The Color Blind
THE_COLOR_BLIND_DESIGNER.description: He can't distinguish between the stage light cues or his own makeup colors. He relies on others to guide him, appearing clingy or slow to learn.

THE_HYPERMOBILE_FRAGILE.name: The Hypermobile
THE_HYPERMOBILE_FRAGILE.description: Double-jointed and incredibly flexible. His lines are beautiful, but his joints are unstable. He's one bad landing away from a career-ending injury.

THE_MIGRAINE_SUTFFERER.name: The Migraine Sufferer
THE_MIGRAINE_SUTFFERER.description: Stage lights and loud music are his worst enemies. He spends his breaks in dark bathrooms, leading to rumors that he's antisocial or arrogant.

THE_HYPERHIDROSIS_SWEATER.name: The Hyperhidrosis Sweater
THE_HYPERHIDROSIS_SWEATER.description: Excessive sweating makes his hands slippery and his makeup run instantly. He's terrified of partner-stunts or camera close-ups.

THE_HEART_MURMUR_RISK.name: The Heart Murmur
THE_HEART_MURMUR_RISK.description: A heart condition limits his peak physical output. He knows he's a ticking time bomb and treats every performance like his last.

THE_STREET_BUSKER.name: The Street Busker
THE_STREET_BUSKER.description: Used to playing for change on subway platforms. He has a raw, unpolished voice and a grit that the 'manufactured' kids lack.

THE_SOCIAL_MEDIA_GHOST.name: The Social Media Ghost
THE_SOCIAL_MEDIA_GHOST.description: The only kid in the dorms who doesn't have a smartphone. He's totally disconnected from the digital world, which makes him a total mystery to fans.

THE_FORMER_SKATER_PUNK.name: The Former Skater
THE_FORMER_SKATER_PUNK.description: He traded his skateboard for dance shoes, but he still has the 'I don't care' attitude and the bruised knees to prove it.

THE_HOMESICK_MAKNAE.name: The Homesick Kid
THE_HOMESICK_MAKNAE.description: The youngest contestant who cries during every phone call home. The audience wants to adopt him, but the judges think he’s too soft.

THE_CHESS_GRANDMASTER.name: The Chess Master
THE_CHESS_GRANDMASTER.description: Calculates the competition like a board game. He’s three steps ahead of everyone’s social moves, but he forgets to show actual emotion on stage.

THE_ADRENALINE_CHASER.name: The Adrenaline Junkie
THE_ADRENALINE_CHASER.description: Loves the high-stakes eliminations and the dangerous stunts. If there isn't a 10% chance of injury, he's bored.

THE_VINTAGE_FLAIR.name: The Vintage Soul
THE_VINTAGE_FLAIR.description: He thinks he was born in the wrong decade. He brings 1950s crooner vibes and old-school manners to a modern pop show.

THE_MILITARY_BRAT.name: The Military Brat
THE_MILITARY_BRAT.description: Moved every two years. He's an expert at making 'instant friends' but never lets anyone see the real him.

THE_DRAMA_MAGNET.name: The Drama Magnet
THE_DRAMA_MAGNET.description: Even when he's silent, drama finds him. If there is a fight in the kitchen, he's somehow in the middle of it. Editors love his reaction shots.

THE_SURVIVALIST_MINIMALIST.name: The Minimalist
THE_SURVIVALIST_MINIMALIST.description: Arrived at the dorms with one small bag. He doesn't care about the makeup, the hair, or the outfits—he's just here to sing.

THE_OVER_AFFECTIONATE_BROMANCER.name: The Bromancer
THE_OVER_AFFECTIONATE_BROMANCER.description: Constantly hugging, leaning on, and praising his teammates. He’s the physical glue of the group, though sometimes it’s a bit much for the others.

THE_FORMER_CHILD_STAR_REDEMPTION.name: The Comeback Kid
THE_FORMER_CHILD_STAR_REDEMPTION.description: Was in a popular sitcom at age 12. He’s 21 now and desperate to prove he’s more than a trivia question. He’s terrified of being 'forgotten'.

THE_GYM_RAT_VISUAL.name: The Gym Rat
THE_GYM_RAT_VISUAL.description: Spends every free second in the gym. His 'visual' is his physique. He often struggles with dance fluidity because he’s too muscle-bound.

THE_POETIC_NIHILIST.name: The Dark Poet
THE_POETIC_NIHILIST.description: Thinks the industry is a void and fame is a cage, but he’s too talented to quit. His dark, moody aura draws in 'emo' fans.

THE_ULTIMATE_FANBOY.name: The Fanboy
THE_ULTIMATE_FANBOY.description: Is a huge fan of another contestant on the show. He follows them around, copies their style, and defends them in every argument.

THE_ONE_PRACTICE_WONDER.name: The Natural
THE_ONE_PRACTICE_WONDER.description: He doesn't need to practice. He watches the choreo once and does it. It infuriates the hard-working contestants and creates massive friction.

THE_REFORMED_JOCK.name: The Reformed Jock
THE_REFORMED_JOCK.description: Used to be the high school quarterback who made fun of theater kids. Now he's one of them, and he's terrified of his old friends seeing the show.

THE_CLASSICAL_INSTRUMENTALIST.name: The Classical Prodigy
THE_CLASSICAL_INSTRUMENTALIST.description: A violin or cello virtuoso who ran away from a conservatory to join a boyband. He sees 'Pop' as a complex mathematical structure.

THE_GOSSIP_COLUMNIST.name: The Snitch
THE_GOSSIP_COLUMNIST.description: Secretly tells the producers everything that happens when the cameras are off. He’s the reason the 'secret' dorm fights always end up in the edit.

THE_POCKET_PERFORMER.name: The Short King
THE_POCKET_PERFORMER.description: Significantly shorter than the other contestants. He overcompensates with explosive energy and the biggest jumps you’ve ever seen.

THE_CONSPIRACY_THEORIST.name: The Skeptic
THE_CONSPIRACY_THEORIST.description: Genuinely believes the whole show is rigged. He spends his time looking for microphones and theorizing about who the PDs have already picked to win.

THE_FORMER_MODEL_TROPE.name: The Catalog Model
THE_FORMER_MODEL_TROPE.description: He was a semi-successful model. He can pose, he can walk, but he has the singing voice of a lawnmower. He survives on visuals alone.

THE_UNLUCKY_CHARM.name: The Jinx
THE_UNLUCKY_CHARM.description: Every team he joins fails. He’s talented and nice, but other contestants have started avoiding him because they think he’s bad luck.

THE_STRICT_TRADITIONALIST.name: The Traditionalist
THE_STRICT_TRADITIONALIST.description: Hates auto-tune, hates modern synths, and thinks choreo should be 'simple and clean'. He’s constantly clashing with the modern producers.

THE_PRACTICAL_JOKER_CHAOS.name: The Prankster
THE_PRACTICAL_JOKER_CHAOS.description: The dorms are his playground. He hides alarm clocks, swaps salt for sugar, and records people sleeping. Everyone loves him until they’re his target.

THE_NEO_HIPSTER.name: The Hipster
THE_NEO_HIPSTER.description: Only wears thrift store clothes and drinks artisan tea. He talks about 'authenticity' and 'the scene' while being on a manufactured reality show.

THE_ACCIDENTAL_HEARTTHROB.name: The Unaware Visual
THE_ACCIDENTAL_HEARTTHROB.description: Doesn't realize he’s handsome. He’s awkward, wears glasses, and hides in the back, but fans are obsessed with his 'nerdy' charm.

THE_FORMER_GANG_AFFILIATE_REDEMPTION.name: The Street Survivor
THE_FORMER_GANG_AFFILIATE_REDEMPTION.description: Grew up in a rough neighborhood and got into trouble young. Music literally saved his life. He has a zero-tolerance policy for drama.

THE_YOGA_GURU_STABILIZER.name: The Zen Master
THE_YOGA_GURU_STABILIZER.description: Keeps the group calm during elimination rounds. He does breathing exercises with the other guys backstage. He’s the heart of the dorm.

THE_HIGH_ENERGY_MC.name: The Natural MC
THE_HIGH_ENERGY_MC.description: Always talking, always hosting. If a producer needs someone to explain a mission to the cameras, he’s the go-to guy.

THE_SLEEP_DEPRIVED_GENIUS.name: The Workaholic
THE_SLEEP_DEPRIVED_GENIUS.description: Is only seen with dark circles under his eyes. He skips meals and sleep to practice. Mentors are impressed, but his health is a ticking time bomb.

THE_LUCKY_REPLACEMENT.name: The Replacement
THE_LUCKY_REPLACEMENT.description: Joined the show in Episode 3 after someone else dropped out. He has the 'imposter syndrome' edit, constantly trying to prove he belongs.

THE_OVER_FAMILIAL_HUGGER.name: The Clingy One
THE_OVER_FAMILIAL_HUGGER.description: Wants to be everyone's best friend instantly. He doesn't understand personal space and takes it personally when people want to be alone.

THE_COMPETITIVE_EATER.name: The Bottomless Pit
THE_COMPETITIVE_EATER.description: In every dorm shot, he's eating. It’s his only personality trait in the edit. Relatable to fans, but boring to judges.

THE_ONE_DIRECTION_CLONE.name: The Indie-Pop Boy
THE_ONE_DIRECTION_CLONE.description: Messy hair, scarf, vest, and a guitar. He refuses to do 'pop' dancing and wants to keep things 'organic' and 'British'.

THE_MYSTERIOUS_MULTILINGUAL.name: The Polyglot
THE_MYSTERIOUS_MULTILINGUAL.description: Speaks 5 languages. He’s the translator for the international kids. He’s so busy helping others that he forgets to focus on his own rank.

THE_OVERLY_DRAMATIC_CRIER.name: The Soap Opera
THE_OVERLY_DRAMATIC_CRIER.description: Cries during songs, cries during rankings, cries during dinner. He feels everything at 200%. High screen time, but fans find him exhausting.

THE_FORMER_BOY_SCOUT.name: The Goody Two-Shoes
THE_FORMER_BOY_SCOUT.description: Follows all the rules. Reports other kids for sneaking in snacks or staying up late. He thinks this will make the mentors like him; it doesn't.

THE_STREET_MAGICIAN_QUIRK.name: The Magician
THE_STREET_MAGICIAN_QUIRK.description: Always has a deck of cards. He performs tricks in the dorms to win over the other guys. It’s charming for a week, then it gets weird.

THE_TECH_ADDICTED_GAMER.name: The Gamer
THE_TECH_ADDICTED_GAMER.description: Sneaked a handheld console into the dorms. He's more interested in leveling up his character than his vocal grade.

THE_ACCIDENTAL_CENTER.name: The Reluctant Center
THE_ACCIDENTAL_CENTER.description: He keeps getting picked for the Center role because of his face, but he’s terrified of the spotlight. He just wants to blend in.

THE_OBSESSIVE_POLISHER.name: The Polisher
THE_OBSESSIVE_POLISHER.description: The song is finished, but he wants to record it 50 more times. He drives his teammates crazy by obsessing over 'imperfections' no one else can hear.

THE_CLOSET_NERD_VISUAL.name: The Secret Nerd
THE_CLOSET_NERD_VISUAL.description: Looks like a heartthrob, but secretly loves anime, coding, and D&D. He’s terrified that if the fans find out, he’ll lose his 'cool' status.

THE_SOCIAL_CLIMBING_CHAMELEON.name: The Chameleon
THE_SOCIAL_CLIMBING_CHAMELEON.description: Changes his personality depending on who is the most popular kid in the room. He’s everyone’s 'best friend' but has no real loyalties.

THE_RUTHLESS_STRATEGIST.name: The Tactician
THE_RUTHLESS_STRATEGIST.description: He doesn’t care about the music; he cares about the vote count. He’s always checking the rankings and calculating which teammates to eliminate next.

THE_STUBBORN_SOLOIST.name: The Soloist
THE_STUBBORN_SOLOIST.description: Was a solo artist before the show. He hates group harmonies and always tries to out-sing everyone else. A nightmare for group scores.

THE_DORM_MOTHER_FIGURE.name: The Dorm Mom
THE_DORM_MOTHER_FIGURE.description: He’s the one sewing up ripped costumes and making sure everyone takes their vitamins. He’s totally uncompetitive and just wants everyone to be happy.

THE_OVERLY_CONFIDENT_FLOP.name: The Confident Flop
THE_OVERLY_CONFIDENT_FLOP.description: Genuinely believes he’s a superstar despite failing every evaluation. The producers keep him around because his lack of self-awareness is hilarious.

THE_SILENT_BUT_STABLE_BACKBONE.name: The Backbone
THE_SILENT_BUT_STABLE_BACKBONE.description: Does all the hard work in the background. He’s the one who teaches the choreo to the slower kids but never takes the credit. The producers ignore him.

THE_TRAGIC_FALLEN_HERO.name: The Fallen Hero
THE_TRAGIC_FALLEN_HERO.description: Was the Rank 1 in Episode 1 but has been sliding down ever since. He’s in a mental spiral, and the show is documenting every tear.

THE_STUNT_SPECIALIST.name: The Stunt Specialist
THE_STUNT_SPECIALIST.description: Recruited specifically for his gymnastics background. He provides the 'wow' factor in every performance but worries he's only seen as a human prop.

THE_VARIETY_REPRESENTATIVE.name: The Variety Rep
THE_VARIETY_REPRESENTATIVE.description: He knows he isn't the best singer or dancer, so he compensates by being the loudest, funniest, and most energetic person in the room.

THE_SECOND_CHANCE_IDOL.name: The Second Chance
THE_SECOND_CHANCE_IDOL.description: He debuted in a group that failed after one month. This is his absolute last chance before he has to give up on his dream forever.

THE_BBOY_PURIST.name: The B-Boy Purist
THE_BBOY_PURIST.description: Comes from the underground dance scene. He finds idol choreography 'silly' and struggles to trade his power moves for synchronized hand gestures.

THE_VOCAL_ONLY_PURIST.name: The Vocal Purist
THE_VOCAL_ONLY_PURIST.description: A powerhouse singer who believes that 'idols' aren't real musicians. He refuses to put effort into dancing, which makes him a polarizing figure.

THE_LANGUAGE_BRIDGE.name: The Bridge
THE_LANGUAGE_BRIDGE.description: Fluent in multiple languages. He spends so much time translating for the international contestants that he often misses his own vocal coaching.

THE_LATE_NIGHT_GHOST.name: The Late Night Ghost
THE_LATE_NIGHT_GHOST.description: Always practicing when the cameras are supposed to be off. He is the first person anyone sees when they wake up and the last one seen before sleep.

THE_UNIFORM_REBEL.name: The Uniform Rebel
THE_UNIFORM_REBEL.description: He customizes every official outfit he's given. He'll rip sleeves or add pins just to stand out, which gets him in constant trouble with the stylists.

THE_PRODIGIOUS_YOUNGLING.name: The Youngling
THE_PRODIGIOUS_YOUNGLING.description: The youngest on the show, but somehow the most technically proficient. He is a 'scary' talent that makes the older contestants feel insecure.

THE_OVERSEAS_EXPAT.name: The Expat
THE_OVERSEAS_EXPAT.description: Moved to the country specifically for the show. He's running from a boring life back home and refuses to return a failure.

THE_MOCK_AUDITION_KING.name: The Audition King
THE_MOCK_AUDITION_KING.description: He was the highest-rated contestant during the preliminary auditions, but as the reality of the show sets in, his scores are steadily dropping.

THE_RELUCTANT_VISUAL.name: The Reluctant Visual
THE_RELUCTANT_VISUAL.description: He hates being called 'pretty.' He wants people to focus on his rapping or dancing, but the show only ever uses slow-motion shots of his face.

THE_SECOND_BORN_SON.name: The Second Born
THE_SECOND_BORN_SON.description: His older brother is a famous athlete or scholar. He's here to prove he can be the 'star' of the family for once.

THE_GYMNAST_ACROBAT.name: The Acrobat
THE_GYMNAST_ACROBAT.description: He doesn't walk, he tumbles. He's the secret weapon for every high-energy dance break, but he risks injury with every performance.

THE_OVER_POLISHED_ROBOT.name: The Machine
THE_OVER_POLISHED_ROBOT.description: He spent 7 years in a different company before this show. He is so perfectly trained that he feels unnatural and lacks a 'human' soul in his singing.

THE_LUCKY_VIRAL_MISTAKE.name: The Viral Accident
THE_LUCKY_VIRAL_MISTAKE.description: He's only on the show because a video of him tripping or doing something embarrassing went viral. He's trying to prove he's more than a joke.
